trendOverride.reason: No trend override: quality 100/88, trend 50/100, sentiment neutral.

authenticity.notes: Authenticity check passed: article has enough specificity, business relevance, source alignment, and trend support.

notes: The article provides a comprehensive, practical guide to implementing Google's AI Max in business workflows.
Strong structure with clear sections covering implementation, use cases, and step-by-step workflows.
Addresses common mistakes and troubleshooting, which adds significant value for practitioners.
Content is well-researched with multiple authoritative sources cited.
Tone and style align with the 'expert guide' positioning.
Content includes a real-world case study with measurable outcomes, adding credibility and practical value.
Well-defined KPIs and tool recommendations support the practical implementation focus.
The article includes an implementation checklist and a 'what to do next' section, guiding readers effectively.
The article is well-targeted to the service business owner or operator, focusing on practical outcomes.
recommendedFixes: Consider adding a visual workflow diagram to enhance understanding of the step-by-step process.
Include a downloadable checklist or PDF summary for easier implementation.
Add a comparison table showing before-and-after metrics for stronger impact illustration.
Incorporate a section on potential cost savings or ROI calculation to further engage business readers.
Clarify any compliance or data privacy considerations when using AI Max, especially for regulated industries.
Provide a brief summary or visual of integrations between tools like Slack, CRM, and Zapier for better clarity.
